page.primary_keyword: marbella yacht charter new years eve 2026
page.title: Marbella Yacht Charter New Year's Eve 2026: Fireworks, Dinner & Party Ideas

data.meta_description: Ring in 2026 with a Marbella yacht charter New Year's Eve. Watch fireworks from Puerto Banús, enjoy dinner & party at sea. Book your luxury boat now.
data.summary: Celebrate New Year's Eve 2026 on a luxury yacht charter in Marbella. Watch fireworks over Puerto Banús, enjoy dinner at sea, and party into the new year with our fleet of 18 boats.
key_facts: New Year's Eve charters available on 18 boats from Puerto Banús.
Fleet includes Astondoa 40 (€749/2h), Azimut 39 (€749/2h), and Mangusta 80 (€4,719/4h).
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA.
Fireworks over Puerto Banús at midnight – best viewed from the water.
Dinner options: catered onboard or at Marbella marina restaurants.
Party ideas: DJ setup, champagne toast, and dancing under the stars.
Book early – New Year's Eve slots fill by mid-December.
Departs Puerto Banús, Marbella's luxury superyacht hub.

faq.q: What boats are available for New Year's Eve 2026 in Marbella?
faq.a: We offer 18 boats from Puerto Banús, including the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax, €749/2h), Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax, €749/2h), and Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax, €4,719/4h with a free jet ski). Larger yachts like the Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) and Canados 86 (26m, 12 pax) are also available – pricing on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Are fireworks visible from the yacht on New Year's Eve?
faq.a: Yes. Puerto Banús hosts a spectacular fireworks display at midnight. From the water, you get an unobstructed view of the show over the marina and the Mediterranean. We recommend anchoring near the harbour entrance for the best perspective.

faq.q: Can I have dinner on the yacht?
faq.a: Absolutely. You can arrange a catered dinner onboard – options include Spanish tapas, seafood platters, or a full multi-course menu. Alternatively, dock at Marbella Marina and dine at a waterfront restaurant before returning to sea for the countdown.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden fees. For example, the Astondoa 40 costs €749 for 2 hours including everything.

faq.q: How far in advance should I book for New Year's Eve?
faq.a: We recommend booking by mid-December 2026. New Year's Eve is our busiest night, and popular boats like the Mangusta 80 and Azimut 58 Flybridge often sell out by early December. Contact us via WhatsApp to secure your slot.

faq.q: Can I bring my own decorations or DJ?
faq.a: Yes, you can bring decorations, a sound system, or a DJ. Let us know in advance so we can assist with setup. Many clients bring balloons, banners, and champagne for a personalised party. The yacht's deck and saloon are perfect for dancing.

faq.q: What if the weather is bad on New Year's Eve?
faq.a: We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe, we'll offer a full refund or reschedule for another date. Marbella's winter climate is mild – average December temperatures are 16°C, and sea conditions are usually calm in the bay.

faq.q: Can I charter a boat for a large group?
faq.a: Yes. Our largest yachts – the Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax), Canados 86 (26m, 12 pax), and Maiora 26m (26m, 12 pax) – can accommodate up to 12 guests. For smaller groups, the Dubhe (8m, 5 pax) or Speedboat (7m, 6 pax) are ideal. Contact us for group pricing.

data.body_html:
Ring in 2026 with a Marbella yacht charter New Year's Eve celebration that blends luxury, fireworks, and the Mediterranean Sea. From the glittering lights of Puerto Banús to the midnight fireworks, a private yacht offers an unforgettable way to welcome the new year. Our fleet of 18 boats departs from Puerto Banús, Marbella's iconic marina, and includes options for every group size and budget.

Why Choose a Yacht for New Year's Eve in Marbella?

Marbella's New Year's Eve is famous for its glamour, but the best seat in the house is on the water. From your private yacht, you'll watch the fireworks reflect off the sea, dine under the stars, and dance with the Costa del Sol skyline as your backdrop. No crowds, no queues – just you, your guests, and the open sea. Plus, all charters include a licensed skipper, so you can focus on celebrating.

Our Fleet for New Year's Eve 2026

We offer 18 boats from Puerto Banús, ranging from intimate speedboats to superyachts. Here are the highlights for New Year's Eve:

  • Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) – €749 for 2 hours, includes skipper, drinks, and snacks.
  • Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) – €749 for 2 hours, same inclusions.
  • Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) – €4,719 minimum 4 hours, includes a free jet ski.
  • Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) – pricing on request via WhatsApp.
  • Canados 86 (26m, 12 pax) – pricing on request.
  • Speedboat (7m, 6 pax) – ideal for an intimate couple's evening.

All boats depart from Puerto Banús. For full details, visit our boat rental Marbella page.

Fireworks Display from the Water

Puerto Banús launches a spectacular fireworks show at midnight on New Year's Eve. From a yacht anchored near the harbour entrance, you'll have a front-row view without the crowds. The reflection of the fireworks on the Mediterranean is a sight you won't forget. We'll position the boat for the best angles – just bring your camera.

Dinner Options: Onboard or Ashore

You have two choices for dinner. Option 1: Catered onboard – we can arrange Spanish tapas, seafood platters, or a gourmet menu. Drinks (cava, wine, beer, soft drinks) are already included. Option 2: Dock at Marbella Marina or Puerto Banús and dine at a waterfront restaurant like Lobito de Mar or Bibo, then return to sea for the countdown. Either way, the yacht is your private base for the night.

Party Ideas: Music, Decor & More

Make it your own. Bring a Bluetooth speaker or hire a DJ. Decorate the saloon with balloons and banners. Pop champagne at midnight – we'll provide the cava and glasses. For a truly memorable night, consider a sunset cruise before dinner, or a post-midnight sail under the stars. The yacht's deck is perfect for dancing, and the saloon offers a cosy retreat if the sea breeze gets chilly.

What's Included in Every Charter

No hidden costs. Every New Year's Eve charter includes:

  • Licensed skipper
  • Fuel
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
  • Light snacks
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%)

For example, the Astondoa 40 at €749 for 2 hours covers everything – just bring your party spirit.

How to Book Your New Year's Eve Yacht

Slots fill quickly, especially for popular boats like the Mangusta 80 and Azimut 58 Flybridge. We recommend booking by mid-December 2026. To reserve, contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred boat, group size, and time. We'll confirm availability and send a secure payment link. For larger groups, we can arrange multiple boats. Check our boat rental Marbella page for the full fleet.

Frequently asked questions

What boats are available for New Year's Eve 2026 in Marbella?

We offer 18 boats from Puerto Banús, including the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax, €749/2h), Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax, €749/2h), and Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax, €4,719/4h with a free jet ski). Larger yachts like the Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) and Canados 86 (26m, 12 pax) are also available – pricing on request via WhatsApp.

Are fireworks visible from the yacht on New Year's Eve?

Yes. Puerto Banús hosts a spectacular fireworks display at midnight. From the water, you get an unobstructed view of the show over the marina and the Mediterranean. We recommend anchoring near the harbour entrance for the best perspective.

Can I have dinner on the yacht?

Absolutely. You can arrange a catered dinner onboard – options include Spanish tapas, seafood platters, or a full multi-course menu. Alternatively, dock at Marbella Marina and dine at a waterfront restaurant before returning to sea for the countdown.

What is included in the charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden fees. For example, the Astondoa 40 costs €749 for 2 hours including everything.

How far in advance should I book for New Year's Eve?

We recommend booking by mid-December 2026. New Year's Eve is our busiest night, and popular boats like the Mangusta 80 and Azimut 58 Flybridge often sell out by early December. Contact us via WhatsApp to secure your slot.

Can I bring my own decorations or DJ?

Yes, you can bring decorations, a sound system, or a DJ. Let us know in advance so we can assist with setup. Many clients bring balloons, banners, and champagne for a personalised party. The yacht's deck and saloon are perfect for dancing.

What if the weather is bad on New Year's Eve?

We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe, we'll offer a full refund or reschedule for another date. Marbella's winter climate is mild – average December temperatures are 16°C, and sea conditions are usually calm in the bay.

Can I charter a boat for a large group?

Yes. Our largest yachts – the Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax), Canados 86 (26m, 12 pax), and Maiora 26m (26m, 12 pax) – can accommodate up to 12 guests. For smaller groups, the Dubhe (8m, 5 pax) or Speedboat (7m, 6 pax) are ideal. Contact us for group pricing.
